---
name: Bug report
about: Something the app does is broken, throws an error, or behaves unexpectedly.
title: "[bug] "
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: []
---

<!-- One-sentence description. E.g. "Submit button on the test page is unresponsive on iPhone Safari." -->

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to <url, e.g. /N5/#/test/moji-3>
2. Click <element>
3. Observe <what happens vs what should happen>

- **Actual:**

## Environment

- **Browser + version:** <e.g. Chrome 119, Safari 17, Firefox 120>
- **Device:** <e.g. iPhone 14 / Galaxy S23 / desktop>
- **OS:** <e.g. macOS 14 / Windows 11 / Android 14 / iOS 17>
- **Level:** N5 / N4 / N3 / N2 / N1
- **App version:** <visible in the footer of the live site, e.g. v1.12.32>
